description_long: This is a white ceramic coffee mug with a classic cylindrical shape and a rounded handle attached to one side. The front of the mug features the phrase 'BIG GIRLS THEORY' in bold black and pink lettering, accompanied by a pair of angled brackets resembling HTML tags above the text. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving the mug a clean, polished appearance. The handle is ergonomically curved, allowing for a comfortable grip, and the interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids. There are no visible chips, cracks, or additional decorative patterns beyond the printed text.
description: A glossy white ceramic mug with a rounded handle and bold 'BIG GIRLS THEORY' text on the front.
description_view_0: The back of the mug is visible, showing the handle and a partial glimpse of the printed text.
description_view_1: The front of the mug is shown, displaying the handle and the full 'BIG GIRLS THEORY' text with angled brackets.
description_view_2: The side opposite the handle is visible, with only a partial view of the printed text and a smooth, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_3: The handle is fully visible on the right, with the rest of the mug's surface plain and unadorned.
